title: Cyber-Physical Attack on a Forward Operating Base
description: A forward operating base is experiencing simultaneous cyber intrusion into its power distribution and physical probing of its perimeter defenses. Friendly forces must defend the base, restore critical systems, and attribute the attack.

enemy_force.name: Hybrid Threat Cell
enemy_force.disposition: Cyber actors remote; physical reconnaissance element observed 2km west
enemy_force.strength_estimate: Unknown cyber actors; 10-15 physical reconnaissance personnel
enemy_force.most_likely_coa: Cyber disruption of power and communications followed by mortar or UAS attack.
enemy_force.most_dangerous_coa: Coordinated cyber-physical attack with ground assault on main gate.

terrain.name: FOB Perimeter
terrain.description: Flat desert with limited natural obstacles.

restrictions: No offensive cyber outside base boundaries without JTF approval
higher_intent: Maintain base integrity and restore full operational capability within 4 hours.
